_meta.purpose: Frozen activity samples for the HYROX classifier regression test. Each row reflects a real shape observed in storage('activities') or dailyLogs.fitActivities — including manually-entered sessions where Garmin doesn't fully support the modality (SkiErg, Rowing) and the user types the name themselves.
_meta.howToRefresh: Run window.coachActivitiesDebug() in the app console, copy the resulting summary, and replace the activities array below. Keep at least one each of: running, ski-erg, rowing, strength, metcon, and an 'other'. The assertion script will exit non-zero if any required bucket is missing.

activities._comment: Standard Garmin-synced run — activityType populated by FIT.
activities.name: Morning Run

activities._comment: Manually-entered ski-erg session. Garmin doesn't have a ski-erg category — user typed the name. Pre-fix this returned 'other' because the regex only checked activityType.
activities.name: SkiErg intervals
activities.title: SkiErg intervals

activities._comment: Manually-entered rowing session — user typed it as Concept2 row.
activities.name: Concept2 row 5k

activities._comment: Manually-entered ski-erg with the variant spelling 'ski erg' (with space).
activities.title: Ski erg easy

activities._comment: Manually-entered row using only the notes field.
activities.name: Indoor cardio

activities._comment: Strength session — activityType set by Garmin Connect.
activities.name: Strength upper body

activities._comment: HYROX-style metcon — typed by the user with the keyword 'wall balls'.
activities.name: Wall balls + burpees AMRAP

activities._comment: A non-HYROX-relevant activity that should classify as 'other' (yoga).
activities.name: Yoga flow
